creator: dirk.meyer@dinoex.sub.org
text:
FidoNet(tm) support package for UN*X platform
	using the "Gatebau" ruleset
	keywords: news, mail, gateway

Fix: 

the following archive create a directory fidogate-4.2.9
	this can be installed in the directory "/usr/ports/news".
	ftp://ftp.dinoex.sub.de/pub/appoved/ports-fidogate-4.2.9.tar.gz
How-To-Repeat: 
	port does not exists in the distribution
